global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a prominent logo and enticing food imagery.
global.main_message: The ad promotes a food delivery service with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base for the ad.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'QuickFork' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Food container
elements.description: A stylized food container with a lid, depicted in a minimalistic design, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food item icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing a food item, placed near the food container.

elements.label: Food item icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon representing a different food item, positioned next to the first icon.

elements.label: Food item icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon representing yet another food item, located adjacent to the other icons.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Hungry? We got you' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fre Shop now

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Shop now' is presented in a clear, inviting font, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top left, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: QuickFork, Hungry? We got you, Shop now
